---
id: delete-dj
title: "Delete DJ profile"
description: "Deletes the specified DJ profile and all associated mixtapes. Returns an HTML fragment confirming deletion."
sidebar_label: "Delete DJ profile"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete DJ profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/vibes/djs/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes the specified DJ profile and all associated mixtapes. Returns an HTML fragment confirming deletion.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
